task_completion.description: The SNAP Graph Builder tool is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window or pane titled 'GraphBuilder' or 'Graph Builder' is visible within the SNAP Desktop application.

task_completion.description: The required nodes (Read, Subset, BandMaths, Write) are added to the visual graph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visual graph pane shows interconnected blocks specifically labeled 'Read', 'Subset', 'BandMaths', and 'Write'.

task_completion.description: The Read node is configured to load the correct multi-spectral image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Read' tab of the Graph Builder, the file path field is set to '/home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif'.

task_completion.description: The BandMaths node is configured with the correct spectral index expression.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'BandMaths' tab or the Band Maths expression editor, the expression field contains exactly '(band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3)'.

task_completion.description: The visual graph definition is saved to the specified XML file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save Graph As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'visual_pipeline.xml' in the '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory, or a success message indicates it was saved there.

task_completion.description: The Write node is configured with the correct output path and the pipeline is executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Write' tab, the output file path is set to '/home/ga/snap_exports/pipeline_output.dim', and there is evidence of execution such as clicking the 'Run' button or a progress bar showing the graph is processing.

integrity.description: The agent used the SNAP Graph Builder GUI to construct the pipeline.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the SNAP Desktop application (clicking tabs, adding nodes, typing in GUI fields) rather than just terminal windows.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually write or copy-paste the XML file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) being used to write the XML graph structure directly.

integrity.description: The agent executed the pipeline via the GUI, not the command line.
integrity.visual_evidence: The pipeline execution is triggered via the 'Run' button in the Graph Builder UI, not by typing 'gpt' or similar command-line tools in a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input data file is located at '/home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif'. The expected visual graph XML output path is '/home/ga/snap_exports/visual_pipeline.xml'. The expected pipeline execution output path is '/home/ga/snap_exports/pipeline_output.dim'.
